scripts.build: bun build src/bun/worker.ts src/dev/phase1-smoke.ts src/dev/phase2-smoke.ts src/dev/phase3-smoke.ts --outdir dist --target bun
scripts.typecheck: tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --skipLibCheck --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --lib ES2022,DOM --types bun-types --allowImportingTsExtensions src/bun/protocol.ts src/bun/errors.ts src/bun/log-buffer.ts src/bun/sse-parser.ts src/bun/api-client.ts src/bun/route-discovery.ts src/bun/runtime-manager.ts src/bun/stream-manager.ts src/bun/worker.ts src/dev/phase1-smoke.ts src/dev/phase2-smoke.ts src/dev/phase3-smoke.ts
